station_address: 17 Veer Savarkar Marg, Old Cadel Rd, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400028
text: Customers visiting the COCO petrol pump for petrol or diesel are being deceived by being told their engine oil level is low and needs topping up. I’m not surprised by this tactic, but it was baffling that it was done by a company-owned and company-controlled petrol pump. (COCO)

station_address: 17 Veer Savarkar Marg, Old Cadel Rd, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400028
text:
As pointed out in many reviews they always ask to open hood to check water levels...
Today something horrible happened with me.
My card payment took a long time the person told me you please proceed to fill air, then the person showed me that my transaction was rejected, he said must be a network issue and he swiped on another machine, on that my transaction was successful I started driving... In 2 mins I got two emails saying there was an attempt to transact on my card in pounds and another mail from my bank clearly saying there was an attempt to pay 700+ USD payment which was rejected because of my security settings... I called my bank and blocked my card. The transaction time was exactly when my card was first swipped.. I will never go back to this pump... Not sure if they are party to this. I am tracking all my transaction for a few days... I have changed my passwords... Take care .... Better safe then sorry.

station_address: 17 Veer Savarkar Marg, Old Cadel Rd, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400028
text:
This Place is a scam ,
I filled my car then worker asked to open the bonnet . They said Oil in my car was low . They emptied bottle but no oil came out from them .
Not even a drop of oil was spilled .
I then later checked with my mechanic.
He mentioned that they hadn't put any oil and messed up my coolant system

station_address: 17 Veer Savarkar Marg, Old Cadel Rd, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400028
text: NEVER FILL UP AT THIS PETROL PUMP. The workers here fill petrol but it doesn't show on the gauge of the car. They distract you with nonsense like engine oil and coolant and don't fill the full amount that you have paid for. This has happened enough times that i can be sure that they are frauds. Asked them for a bill and they didn't give one. I REPEAT, NEVER FILL UP AT THIS PLACE.. Even for PUC they charge an extra for a lamination that noone asked them to do.

station_address: 17 Veer Savarkar Marg, Old Cadel Rd, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400028
text: This Indian oil  petrol pump is easily accessible. They provide quick service. They have free air pressure service and nitrogen digital tyreinflator. On the occasion of holi their staff wished us happy Holi and gifted a box of colors.
